class.name: FtgPackage
class.summary: Loader for FTG archives (Dark Reign game format)
class.details: Reads FTG archives as used by the Dark Reign game. The FTG format stores files in a flat directory with 28-byte filenames, uncompressed data at fixed offsets. Register with FS_LoadBundle to make files accessible via FS_LoadFile as "bundlename/filename". To load sprites, create ImageLibrary entries from the extracted bitmap data, define SpriteAnimation frame rects, and assign them to SKSpriteNode.Animation.
